text: Student teachers are placed with mentors who have not done this work themselves.
Family feedback this year was that their child felt known by their teachers. Equity work is mostly a committee, not yet a system-wide expectation.
The literature is clear; the implementation systems are not.
Preservice training did not prepare me to teach the students in front of me.
The new curriculum committee includes family voices for the first time. Our coaching cycles have helped me adjust lessons so students see themselves in the work.
We need more educators of color, not just one in each building.
